name: collection_page_6_collections_teaware

observed_strengths.observation: Teaware collection intro ('Elevate Your Tea Ritual') frames accessories as ritual enhancers, supporting attach to the consumable catalog

missing_or_weak.observation: Thin teaware range (Tea Infuser, Mug, Tea Bags) with no bundling between teaware and tea on the collection page
No ratings or filtering on the grid, same as the teas collection

purchase_path_notes: Teaware acts as an attach category to teas, but the collection presents items individually with no bundle path.
